channel.title: mrs.space.cadet TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from mrs.space.cadet

item.title: Best salad of my life. I bought this @Gardyn over the winter as a very early Mother’s Day present to myself and I officially love it and the deer can’t eat any of it like they do outside 🙂‍↔️
item.description: Best salad of my life. I bought this @Gardyn over the winter as a very early Mother’s Day present to myself and I officially love it and the deer can’t eat any of it like they do outside 🙂‍↔️
🙂‍↕️

item.title: Did I do it right?
item.description: Did I do it right?

item.title: It’s shorts gobbling season and these thighs are hungry
item.description: It’s shorts gobbling season and these thighs are hungry

item.title: Training for my 5hr flight to podcast at the @Enhanced Games in Las Vegas 💪 🏋️‍♀️ My podcast 👉 @Nonmembers Only
item.description: Training for my 5hr flight to podcast at the @Enhanced Games in Las Vegas 💪 🏋️‍♀️ My podcast 👉 @Nonmembers Only

item.title: On my way to getting my first pull-up!! Let me know if you want to see the rest of the results. I repeated the same exact strength test from week 1 of the Pullup Revolution program to compare.
item.description: On my way to getting my first pull-up!! Let me know if you want to see the rest of the results. I repeated the same exact strength test from week 1 of the Pullup Revolution program to compare.

item.title: Oh and everything is bad for us and seed oils or whatever
item.description: Oh and everything is bad for us and seed oils or whatever

item.title: I think we could all use some tree tunnel vibes and touching some actual grass or is it just me after a weekend in Vegas where nothing seemed real in a not so good way 👀
item.description: I think we could all use some tree tunnel vibes and touching some actual grass or is it just me after a weekend in Vegas where nothing seemed real in a not so good way 👀

item.title: Let me get some health and shield real quick #fortnite
item.description: Let me get some health and shield real quick #fortnite

item.title: I only run in bike shorts but I’m once again on the hunt for non-spandex shorts that don’t ride up my thighs. These are the Clementine 2.0 shorts 4” from Vuori. I’ll cover the other pair of shorts in my next shorts video!
item.description: I only run in bike shorts but I’m once again on the hunt for non-spandex shorts that don’t ride up my thighs. These are the Clementine 2.0 shorts 4” from Vuori. I’ll cover the other pair of shorts in my next shorts video!

item.title: Not only are @herbalessences scents SO nostalgic to me, they also help me combat all of the not-so-good smells that surround me in this stage of life. Chamomile is a classic favorite of mine. Do you have a favorite scent?? #ad #herbalessencespartner
item.description: Not only are @herbalessences scents SO nostalgic to me, they also help me combat all of the not-so-good smells that surround me in this stage of life. Chamomile is a classic favorite of mine. Do you have a favorite scent?? #ad #herbalessencespartner

item.title: With the nicer weather starting, this is a fun way to get outside and moving when you might not have the motivation for a run. What songs would you add to your playlist??
item.description: With the nicer weather starting, this is a fun way to get outside and moving when you might not have the motivation for a run. What songs would you add to your playlist??

item.title: #IcyHotPartner Whether you have sore feet from standing all day or you suddenly decided you need to be able to do a pull-up and now you’re strength training 5 days a week, you can easily grab a 3 pack of @icyhotus Lidocaine pain relief no mess roll-ons at
item.description: #IcyHotPartner Whether you have sore feet from standing all day or you suddenly decided you need to be able to do a pull-up and now you’re strength training 5 days a week, you can easily grab a 3 pack of @icyhotus Lidocaine pain relief no mess roll-ons at

item.title: Especially if that thing is running, but you can apply this to anything. What people think of us is none of our business 🙂‍↔️
item.description: Especially if that thing is running, but you can apply this to anything. What people think of us is none of our business 🙂‍↔️

item.title: Also, to anyone who thinks they can’t start running because they don’t have the perfect gear and all the information in the world, you’re just holding yourself back. Put your Fruit of the Loom sweats on and put one foot in front of the other. Happy Global
item.description: Also, to anyone who thinks they can’t start running because they don’t have the perfect gear and all the information in the world, you’re just holding yourself back. Put your Fruit of the Loom sweats on and put one foot in front of the other. Happy Global

item.title: You can watch the self doubt melt away
item.description: You can watch the self doubt melt away

item.title: I’m all about cheat codes and therefore I’m all about the @adidas Hyperboost Edge. I could say all the technical lingo but you really have to try them on to feel the difference yourself. #createdwithadidas
item.description: I’m all about cheat codes and therefore I’m all about the @adidas Hyperboost Edge. I could say all the technical lingo but you really have to try them on to feel the difference yourself. #createdwithadidas

item.title: I’m now starting week 9 of the @pulluprevolution program and I’m starting to notice a lot more progress. Do you think I can get a full pull-up by week 12??
item.description: I’m now starting week 9 of the @pulluprevolution program and I’m starting to notice a lot more progress. Do you think I can get a full pull-up by week 12??

item.title: Am I missing a common sense solution or are you not wearing sunscreen? The days are heating up and this is the one thing holding me back from running in a sports bra 😩
item.description: Am I missing a common sense solution or are you not wearing sunscreen? The days are heating up and this is the one thing holding me back from running in a sports bra 😩

item.title: And somehow every year I’m surprised at how uncomfortable it is…? Usually during a workout or returning to the house after a run 🫪
item.description: And somehow every year I’m surprised at how uncomfortable it is…? Usually during a workout or returning to the house after a run 🫪

item.title: And meeting my fiber goals
item.description: And meeting my fiber goals

item.title: Is it too much to ask to have a pair of flowy shorts that DOESN’T RIDE UP MY THIGHS?! Apparently.
item.description: Is it too much to ask to have a pair of flowy shorts that DOESN’T RIDE UP MY THIGHS?! Apparently.

item.title: and apparently I’m allergic to strength training and cardio at the same time so now I’m walking to build my cardio back after only focusing on strength but then when I start running again I will slack on the strength until I’m only running. Share your adv
item.description: and apparently I’m allergic to strength training and cardio at the same time so now I’m walking to build my cardio back after only focusing on strength but then when I start running again I will slack on the strength until I’m only running. Share your adv

item.title: It’s the little things 😌 I love progress that is easy to feel and see. Last week the most I could do was kind of switch some of my weight to one hand but could not take a hand off the bar to move it like this.
item.description: It’s the little things 😌 I love progress that is easy to feel and see. Last week the most I could do was kind of switch some of my weight to one hand but could not take a hand off the bar to move it like this.

item.title: Thought it would be interesting to see how long I could walk before these shorts started to ride up my thighs. These were recommended to me but I do not recommend them to you (Blooming Jelly Women’s Workout Shorts)
item.description: Thought it would be interesting to see how long I could walk before these shorts started to ride up my thighs. These were recommended to me but I do not recommend them to you (Blooming Jelly Women’s Workout Shorts)

item.title: And now they can’t get rid of me 🙂‍↔️ Is my assumption at the end correct?!
item.description: And now they can’t get rid of me 🙂‍↔️ Is my assumption at the end correct?!

item.title: Just act normal 🫪
item.description: Just act normal 🫪

item.title: I want to do a pull-up more than I don’t want to do this workout 🏋️‍♀️
item.description: I want to do a pull-up more than I don’t want to do this workout 🏋️‍♀️

item.title: It’s week 12 of trying to do a pull-up and I have observations to document. I’ll share exact progress soon but for now this is my reality being dedicated to following a 5 day a week program to get my first pull-up while kids are on summer break and having
item.description: It’s week 12 of trying to do a pull-up and I have observations to document. I’ll share exact progress soon but for now this is my reality being dedicated to following a 5 day a week program to get my first pull-up while kids are on summer break and having

item.title: Maybe you could suggest doing something mid panic attack idk
item.description: Maybe you could suggest doing something mid panic attack idk
